item.title: 苹果智能眼镜曝光：四款镜框、多种配色，还有库克同款
item.guid: 苹果智能眼镜曝光：四款镜框、多种配色，还有库克同款
item.description:
According to information revealed by Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman yesterday in his PowerOn column, Apple is developing its first smart glasses product, internally codenamed N50, with plans for release by the end of this year or early next year, and an official market launch set for next year. 据彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 昨天在 PowerOn 专栏中曝光的信息，苹果正在开发其首款智能眼镜产品，内部代号为 N50，计划于今年底或明年初发布，正式上市时间定于明年。

Gurman pointed out that the functionality of these glasses is similar to the Meta Ray-Ban series, focusing on practical daily use cases: taking photos and videos, answering calls, receiving notifications, playing music, and performing daily operations via voice assistant, and will feature AI Siri, launched alongside iOS 27 . Gurman 指出，这款眼镜的功能定位与 Meta Ray-Ban 系列相似，主打日常实用场景：拍照录像、接听电话、收听通知、播放音乐，以及通过语音助手实现日常操作， 并搭载与 iOS 27 一同推出的 AI Siri 。

From a design perspective, unlike Meta, which primarily relies on Essilor for frames, and Google and Samsung, which entered the market with Warby Parker, Apple plans to design its frames entirely in-house, aiming to create a recognizable "iconic" look. 设计层面，与 Meta 主要依赖依视路提供镜框、Google 和三星借助 Warby Parker 入局不同，苹果计划完全自主设计，以期打造出具有辨识度的「标志性」外观。

Apple plans to launch at least four frame styles and offer a variety of color options. Currently, the tested designs include: large rectangular frames (similar in style to Ray-Ban Wayfarers), slender rectangular frames (similar to those Apple CEO Tim Cook wears daily), large oval or round frames, and smaller, more delicate oval or round frames. 苹果计划推出至少四种镜框样式，并提供多种配色选择，目前测试中的方案包括：大尺寸矩形框（风格近似 Ray-Ban Wayfarers）、细长矩形框（与苹果 CEO 库克日常佩戴款式相近）、大号椭圆或圆形框，以及更小巧精致的椭圆或圆形款。

Regarding colors, Apple is exploring options such as black, ocean blue, and light brown. The frame material uses high-end acetate fiber, offering superior durability and texture compared to the ordinary plastic used by most brands on the market. 配色方面，苹果正在探索黑色、海洋蓝和浅棕等选项，镜框材质采用高端醋酸纤维，耐用性和质感均优于市面上大多数品牌所用的普通塑料。

Camera design is also a key differentiation point for Apple. It is reported that Apple is considering a design solution with vertically arranged oval lenses accompanied by surrounding lights, differing from the circular cameras on Meta products. 摄像头设计同样是苹果的差异化着力点。据悉，苹果正在考虑采用竖向排列的椭圆形镜头配合环绕灯光的设计方案，有别于 Meta 产品上的圆形摄像头。

item.title: 理想炮轰日系品牌「黑水军」拉踩，东风日产：尊重同行
item.guid: 理想炮轰日系品牌「黑水军」拉踩，东风日产：尊重同行
item.description:
According to reports from The Paper and Bianews, Li Xiang, CEO of Li Auto, recently posted publicly on his WeChat Moments, stating that a certain Japanese brand extensively hired "marketing accounts" to disparage Li Auto's products and massively used "dark trolls" with blank accounts to fabricate false information and flood product review sections, severely impacting Li Auto's normal operations. 据澎湃新闻、鞭牛士报道，理想汽车 CEO 李想日前在朋友圈公开发文称，某日系品牌大量雇佣「营销号」对理想产品进行「拉踩」，并海量使用空白账号的「黑水军」捏造虚假信息、攻陷产品评论区，严重影响理想汽车正常经营。

Li Xiang directly stated that "this is the most egregious behavior under anti-involution regulations," and indicated that he would protect rights through legal means, while also calling on relevant departments to intervene and rectify the situation, saying, "unregulated overseas brands must not be allowed to undermine the positive achievements and market atmosphere of the automotive industry's anti-involution efforts." 李想直言「这属于反内卷规定中最恶劣的行为」，并表示将通过法律手段维权，同时呼吁相关部门介入整治，「不能让不受管制的海外品牌破坏了汽车行业反内卷的良好成果和市场氛围」。

These remarks were directly aimed at Dongfeng Nissan. Some automotive bloggers revealed that a large number of templated "water army" (paid commentators) press releases have recently appeared across the internet, with titles uniformly stating "After Test Driving the NX8 and i6, I Am Utterly Speechless...", and content consistently praising Dongfeng Nissan's NX8 while disparaging Li Auto's i6. The rhetoric is highly similar, suggesting organized malicious marketing. 此番言论矛头直指东风日产。有车圈博主曝光，全网近期出现大量模板化水军通稿，标题统一为《试驾 NX8 和 i6 后，我彻底无语了……》，内容清一色吹捧东风日产 NX8、拉踩理想 i6，话术高度雷同，疑似有组织的恶意营销行为。

Li Auto's legal department official account immediately posted, further disclosing investigation details: "The relevant posts and comments are highly homogeneous content about choosing between two cars, and the posting IP addresses and times are unusually concentrated, showing clear signs of organization, which does not conform to the characteristics of normal user spontaneous discussion." 理想汽车法务部官方账号随即发文，进一步披露调查细节：「相关帖文及评论均为买车二选一的高度同质化内容，发文 IP 地址和时间异常集中，存在明显的组织化痕迹，不符合正常用户自发讨论的特征。」

In response, Wang Qian, General Manager of the New Energy Brand at Dongfeng Nissan Automobile Sales Co., Ltd., responded via an official verified account, stating: "Dongfeng Nissan has always adhered to industry rules, advocated for healthy competition, and respects every peer working hard for China's automotive industry, including Li Auto." 对此，东风日产汽车销售有限公司新能源品牌总经理王骞通过官方认证账号回应称：「东风日产始终恪守行业规则，倡导良性竞争，尊重每一家为中国汽车产业努力的同行，包括理想汽车。」

Additionally, according to IT Home, Li Xiang posted again on his WeChat Moments yesterday regarding the incident of Li Auto being slandered: 另据 IT 之家消息，李想昨日针对理想汽车被黑事件再发朋友圈：

The first time he was slandered, some people advised him to be mature and self-reflect, asking why only he was targeted and not others. The second time he was slandered, others suggested, "You can cry out in pain, but control the decibels of your voice to make the person hitting you comfortable." Then, there would be a third, fourth, and Nth time. "Actually, everyone loves your maturity and forbearance."

item.title: 马斯克版微信亮相 App Store，周五开放下载
item.guid: 马斯克版微信亮相-App-Store，周五开放下载
item.description:
Recently, Elon Musk's long-awaited X version of WeChat, "XChat," officially launched on the App Store and will be officially released on April 17th. It is reported that the app is positioned as a private communication space, with the official claim that it possesses three core features: no ads, no data tracking, and complete end-to-end encryption. 近期，马斯克 Call 了许久的 X 版微信「XChat」正式上线 App Store，并将于 4 月 17 日正式推出。 据悉，该 App 定位为私密通讯空间，官方宣称其具备无广告、无数据追踪及完全端到端加密三大核心特性。

At the communication function level, XChat provides strict privacy protection mechanisms such as message editing and two-way recall, self-destructing messages (e.g., automatically destroying after 5 minutes), and screenshot prevention. 在通讯功能层面，XChat 提供了消息编辑与双向撤回、阅后即焚（如设定 5 分钟自动销毁）、防屏幕截图拦截等严格的隐私保护机制。

Additionally, the application supports cross-device, cross-platform audio and video calls, as well as large-scale group chats. The app has deeply integrated xAI's Grok AI, allowing users to directly invoke Grok within the conversation flow to parse PDF files or generate travel plans, thus combining basic communication with AI tools. 另外，该应用支持跨设备跨平台的音视频通话，以及大规模群组聊天。 应用内部已深度集成 xAI 旗下的 Grok 人工智能，用户可直接在对话流中调用 Grok 解析 PDF 文件或生成行程规划等任务，实现了基础通讯与 AI 工具的结合。

Previous reports mentioned that Musk pointed out that WeChat highly integrates high-frequency, essential functions such as communication, social networking, content, and payments, allowing Chinese users to virtually "live in WeChat," and he hopes to achieve a similar experience on X. 此前曾有报道提及，马斯克指出，微信将通讯、社交、内容与支付等高频刚需功能高度融合，中国用户几乎可以「生活在微信里」，并希望能在 X 实现类似的体验。

item.title: 小红书首届黑客松巅峰赛落幕，00 后包揽大奖、最小参赛者仅 12 岁
item.guid: 小红书首届黑客松巅峰赛落幕，00-后包揽大奖、最小参赛者仅-12-岁
item.description:
Xiaohongshu recently held the offline finals of its first "Hackathon Summit" at the Zhangjiang AI Innovation Town in Shanghai. 200 shortlisted contestants underwent 48 hours of extreme development and roadshow evaluations, with ten teams ultimately reaching the grand final stage to compete for hardware, software track awards, and the overall grand prize. 小红书日前在上海张江人工智能创新小镇举办首届「黑客松巅峰赛」线下决赛。200 名入围选手经历 48 小时极限开发与路演评选，最终十支团队登上总决赛舞台，角逐硬件、软件赛道奖项及全场大奖。

The overall grand prize was won by 22-year-old Ye Bowen and his team, who created the Pocket Guitar, a smart card-sized guitar hardware using remote sensing technology, earning them a 200,000 yuan prize. The first prize in the hardware track went to "Brain-Controlled Wheelchair," while the first prize in the software track was awarded to the AI hairstyle design product "Chic Chic." 全场大奖由 22 岁的叶博文及其团队摘得，他们以遥感技术打造了可放入口袋的卡片吉他智能硬件 Pocket Guitar，斩获 20 万元奖金。硬件赛道一等奖归属「脑控轮椅」，软件赛道一等奖则由 AI 发型设计产品「Chic Chic」获得。

Over 60% of the shortlisted contestants in this competition were born after 2000, with the youngest participant being only 12 years old. The team "Page One," which won the "AI Natives" special unit award, consisted of four middle school students with an average age of just 13.5 years. They completed a popular note diagnosis AI agent system in less than 24 hours. 本届赛事超过 60% 的入围选手为 00 后，最小的参赛者仅 12 岁。获得「AI 原住民」特别单元奖的团队「Page One」由四位初中生组成，平均年龄仅 13.5 岁，他们在不到 24 小时内完成了一款爆款笔记诊断 AI 智能体系统。

Cao Xi, a renowned investor and founder of Monolith, stated at the awards ceremony: "Last year, many of the entrepreneurs we met were born in '95 or '97; this year, many we've seen are already post-00s." 知名投资人、Monolith 创始人曹曦在颁奖现场表示：「去年我们见的很多创业者还是 95、97 后，今年见到的很多都已经是 00 后了。」

Within 48 hours, 59 software and hardware works were successively created, covering areas such as embodied intelligent mahjong robots, AI Chinese nurturing pets, and cross-modal scent cameras, demonstrating the new generation of creators' keen grasp of real-world needs. 在 48 小时内，59 件软硬件作品相继诞生，涵盖具身智能麻将机器人、AI 中式养成系宠物、跨模态气味相机等方向，呈现出新一代创造者对真实需求的敏锐捕捉。

item.title: 曝特斯拉引入欣旺达动力电池
item.guid: 曝特斯拉引入欣旺达动力电池
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Sunwoda Power, a subsidiary of Sunwoda focusing on power battery business, has officially entered Tesla's global supply chain, becoming its fifth power battery supplier. The relevant batteries have been shipped from Sunwoda's Yiwu factory in Zhejiang and are installed in export models produced at Tesla's Shanghai factory. 据 36 氪报道，欣旺达旗下专注动力电池业务的子公司欣旺达动力，已正式进入特斯拉全球供应链，成为其第五家动力电池供应商。相关电池已从欣旺达浙江义乌工厂出货，搭载于特斯拉上海工厂生产的出口车型之上。

This cooperation adopts a new model. Tesla directly procures battery cells from Sunwoda, while modules and PACKs (battery packs) are manufactured by Tesla itself. This differs from the previous method of purchasing complete modules from CATL, and it also means that Tesla will gain more pricing power and customization rights to achieve deep control over battery costs. 此次合作采用了新模式。特斯拉直接向欣旺达采购电芯，模组与 PACK（电池包）则由特斯拉自行制造。这与此前从宁德时代采购完整模组的方式不同，也意味着特斯拉将掌握更多定价权与定制权，以实现对电池成本的深度管控。

Insiders revealed that the power battery cells supplied by Sunwoda to Tesla use third-generation lithium iron phosphate material, supporting a charging rate increase to 3C. 知情人士透露，欣旺达为特斯拉供应的动力电芯采用第三代磷酸铁锂材料，支持充电倍率提升至 3C。

Currently, there is no definitive conclusion on when Sunwoda batteries will be installed in Tesla models sold domestically. Battery industry insiders analyze that Tesla usually has an observation period of nearly a year for new components, but other decision-making factors cannot be ruled out. 目前，欣旺达电池何时搭载于特斯拉国内销售车型尚无定论。有电池行业人士分析，特斯拉对新零部件通常有将近一年的观察期，但不排除其他决策因素介入。

item.title: 小米汽车：XLA 和其他家的 VLA 的区别在「X」能力
item.guid: 小米汽车：XLA-和其他家的-VLA-的区别在「X」能力
item.description:
Recently, Xiaomi Auto released "Xiaomi Auto Q&A with Netizens" Episode 234. It mentioned that XLA is an extension of the industry's mainstream VLA technology, with the core difference being the arbitrary modality capability represented by "X". 近日，小米汽车发布「小米汽车答网友问」第 234 集。其中提到，XLA 是对行业主流 VLA 技术的扩展，核心差异在于「X」所代表的任意模态能力。

Compared to common industry solutions, XLA natively supports more modalities of information input—in addition to video, radar, and navigation, it also incorporates sound and even robot data, aiming for a more comprehensive perception of complex traffic environments. 相比业内常见方案，XLA 原生支持更多模态的信息输入——除视频、雷达、导航外，还引入了声音乃至机器人数据，以期更全面地感知复杂交通环境。

In terms of inference mechanisms, XLA performs high-speed logical deduction in the latent space using machine language, without the need to translate the thought process into human language. The official statement claims this approach balances low latency and interpretability. Additionally, the system continues to apply reinforcement learning and world model technologies to ensure safe and controllable behavior. 在推理机制上，XLA 在潜空间内以机器语言进行高速逻辑推演，无需将思考过程转译为人类语言，官方称此举兼顾了低时延性与可解释性。此外，该系统延续应用了强化学习与世界模型技术，以确保行为安全可控。

item.title: 蔚来李斌：智能电动时代迭代太快，一款车浪费几个亿是常态
item.guid: 蔚来李斌：智能电动时代迭代太快，一款车浪费几个亿是常态
item.description:
According to IT Home, at the High-Level Forum on the Development of Smart Electric Vehicles, William Li, founder and chairman of Nio, stated that the rapid product iteration in the era of smart electric vehicles is causing significant resource waste. He pointed out that a car model often needs to start a new round of iteration just after its production capacity ramp-up is completed, "it's normal for a car to waste several hundred million [yuan]." 据 IT 之家报道，在智能电动汽车发展高层论坛上，蔚来创始人、董事长李斌表示，智能电动时代的快速产品迭代正在造成大量资源浪费。他指出，一款车型往往在产能爬坡刚完成后便需启动新一轮迭代，「一款车浪费几个亿很正常」。

Li Bin summarized this phenomenon as "no flower stays red for a hundred days" – initial orders for new cars are strong, and companies expand production accordingly, but by the time capacity catches up, market enthusiasm often has already faded. 李斌将这一现象概括为「花无百日红」——新车上市初期订单旺盛，企业随即扩产，但等到产能跟上，市场热度往往已经消退。

He believes that the accelerated iteration of electric vehicle products makes it increasingly difficult to balance supply and demand in the industry, and the core pressure facing the entire industry remains profitability. In response, Li Bin called for promoting the standardization of battery cells and the unification of chips, believing this would bring cost reduction opportunities exceeding hundreds of billions of yuan to the industry. 他认为，电动汽车产品迭代提速，使得行业供需平衡的难度持续加大，当前整个行业面临的核心压力依然是盈利压力。对此，李斌呼吁推动电芯标准化与芯片统一化，认为这将为行业带来超千亿元的降本机会。

At the chip strategy level, Nio is currently advancing the "normalization" and "standardization" of automotive chips. Li Bin expects that by next year, Nio's localization rate for automotive semiconductors will reach 35%~40%. 在芯片战略层面，蔚来目前正推进车用芯片的「归一化」与「标准化」工作，李斌预计，到明年蔚来车用半导体国产化率将达到 35%~40%。

item.title: 一汽高管：卖一辆车亏两三万，本土车企不能只顾内卷
item.guid: 一汽高管：卖一辆车亏两三万，本土车企不能只顾内卷
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, at the High-Level Forum on the Development of Smart Electric Vehicles (2026) held from April 11th to 12th, Zhou Shiying, Deputy General Manager of China FAW's Strategy and Cooperation Department, pointed out that the current situation for local Chinese car companies is quite severe. 据新浪财经报道，在 4 月 11 日至 12 日召开的智能电动汽车发展高层论坛（2026）上，中国一汽战略与合作部副总经理周时莹指出，当前中国本土车企的处境已相当严峻。

"Selling a car means losing twenty to thirty thousand yuan," and many high-quality component enterprises are also struggling to operate. She further asked, "Are we destined to forever compete against each other only in the domestic market?" 「卖一辆车就要亏损两三万块钱」，众多优质零部件企业的经营同样举步维艰。她追问道：「难道我们未来永远只能在国内市场互相厮杀吗？」

In her view, the root cause of this predicament lies in the industry's internal redundant construction and resource depletion. She cited examples of vehicle manufacturers establishing their own chip companies and computing centers, pointing out that this "each fighting their own battle" model is extremely inefficient. 在她看来，这一困局的根源在于行业内部的重复建设与资源内耗。她以整车企业纷纷自建芯片公司、算力中心为例，指出这种各自为战的模式效率极低。

If this continues, they might even have to develop controllable nuclear fusion to power computing centers, doing too many unnecessary things.

She called on the entire industry to formulate unified standardized interfaces around the integration of artificial intelligence and automobiles, promoting reasonable division of labor: computing power companies focusing on computing services, high-process electronic component companies focusing on core component R&D, OS software companies focusing on operating system development, and vehicle manufacturers returning to their core responsibilities of brand building, safety assurance, and the integration of power chassis and intelligence. 她呼吁整个行业围绕人工智能与汽车的结合，制定统一的标准化接口，推动合理分工：算力公司专注算力服务，高制程电子元器件公司专注核心元器件研发，OS 软件公司专注操作系统开发，整车企业则回归品牌建设、安全保障及动力底盘与智能化的整合本职。

She emphasized that if the industry cannot support each other and allow specialized companies to leverage their advantages under an open technical architecture, "in the long run, the entire industry will struggle to have good development prospects." 她强调，若行业无法相互扶持、在开放技术架构下让专业公司发挥优势，「长期来看，整个行业很难有好的发展前景」。

item.title: 💡 PUBG 老板：玩法好就行，AI 画美术没什么问题
item.guid: 💡-PUBG-老板：玩法好就行，AI-画美术没什么问题
item.description:
According to IGN, Taeseok Jang, head of PUBG Studios, recently expressed a relatively tolerant stance on the application of generative AI in game development, believing that as long as the gameplay is excellent enough, there is nothing wrong with developers using AI to generate art assets. 据 IGN 报道，PUBG Studios 负责人 Taeseok Jang 近日就生成式 AI 在游戏开发中的应用表达了相对宽容的立场，认为只要游戏玩法足够出色，开发者使用 AI 生成美术资产并无不妥。

Earlier this year, the popular annual game "Crimson Desert" was embroiled in an AI controversy—developer Pearl Abyss was discovered by players to have used AI to generate some in-game artworks, and subsequently issued a public apology, admitting that the relevant assets "were unintentionally included in the final version" and stating that they should have been disclosed to players in advance. 今年初，年度热门游戏《红色沙漠》深陷 AI 风波——开发商 Pearl Abyss 被玩家发现游戏内部分画作由 AI 生成，随即发表公开道歉，承认相关资产「被无意间纳入最终版本」，并表示本应提前向玩家披露。

Regarding the question of "whether developers should apologize for using AI," Taeseok Jang admitted it was "a bit tricky" and stated that he is still continuously researching and observing AI application cases within the industry. 对于「开发者是否应为使用 AI 道歉」这一问题，张泰锡坦言「有些棘手」，并表示自己仍在持续研究和观察行业内的 AI 应用案例。

As a player, if the gameplay is good enough, I don't care if they use AI for art... From a developer or investor's perspective, the situation might be different.

When elaborating on PUBG Studios' own AI strategy, Tae-seok Jang positioned it as a production tool: 在阐述 PUBG Studios 自身的 AI 策略时，张泰锡将其定位为一种生产工具：

We believe it's like Maya, which we used in the past, with no essential difference in purpose. AI can free us from repetitive tasks, allowing us to invest more time and energy into refining the gameplay experience.

He also admitted that the team's actual application of AI in new gameplay development is still quite limited, and the overall process is still in the exploratory phase. 他也坦承，目前团队在新玩法开发中对 AI 的实际应用程度仍相当有限，整体还处于探索阶段。

item.title: 宇树机器人跑步速度刷新全球纪录，王兴兴：年内将超博尔特
item.guid: 宇树机器人跑步速度刷新全球纪录，王兴兴：年内将超博尔特
item.description:
Recently, Unitree Robotics released a running test video of its H1 humanoid robot, which achieved a measured peak running speed of 10 meters/second, setting a new world record for humanoid robot running speed. The hashtag 'Unitree Robot 100-meter sprint 10 meters per second' once topped Weibo's trending searches. 近日，宇树科技发布旗下 H1 人形机器人跑步测试视频，实测峰值奔跑速度达到 10 米/秒，刷新全球人形机器人奔跑速度纪录。词条「宇树机器人百米冲刺 10 米每秒」一度登上微博热搜。

For reference, the 100-meter world record held by Usain Bolt, the fastest sprinter in human history and a Jamaican legend, translates to a peak speed of approximately 10.44 meters/second. 作为参照，人类历史上最快的短跑运动员、牙买加传奇尤塞恩·博尔特保持的百米世界纪录折合峰值速度约为 10.44 米/秒。

Official parameters show that the H1 is 180 cm tall, has leg length of 0.8 meters, weighs approximately 62 kg, has a regular moving speed of 3.3 meters/second, and its potential athletic performance is marked as greater than 5 meters/second. 官方参数显示，H1 身高 180 厘米，腿长 0.8 米，体重约 62 公斤，常规移动速度为 3.3 米/秒，潜在运动性能标注大于 5 米/秒。

The H1 participating in this running test underwent race-specific modifications, with its head and hands removed. Unitree Robotics described it as 'achieving world champion speed with the physique of an ordinary person'. 参与本次跑步测试的 H1 经过适赛化改造，去掉了头部与手部。宇树科技将其形容为「用普通人的体质，跑出了世界冠军的速度」。

In March this year, Wang Xingxing, founder of Unitree Robotics, predicted at the Yabuli Forum that by mid-year, humanoid robots globally, especially in China, would run faster than humans, with 100-meter sprint speeds under 10 seconds, 'faster than Bolt' . 今年 3 月，宇树科技创始人王兴兴在亚布力论坛上曾预判，到今年年中，全球尤其是中国人形机器人将跑得比人更快，百米冲刺速度可达 10 秒以内， 「比博尔特更快一些」 。

item.title: OPPO Pad Mini 官宣定档 4 月 21 日
item.description:
OPPO officially announced yesterday that the OPPO Pad Mini tablet will make its global debut on April 21. The official poster confirms that the new product will feature the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 flagship chip, be equipped with a 2.5K OLED eye-care soft light screen, and boast an ultra-thin and light design. OPPO 昨日官宣，OPPO Pad Mini 平板将于 4 月 21 日全球首发。官方海报确认，新品搭载第五代骁龙 8 旗舰芯片，配备 2.5K OLED 明眸柔光屏，并主打超轻薄设计。

Previous leaked information indicated that the device would have a screen size of approximately 8.8 inches, support 144Hz high refresh rate, come with 12GB of RAM, an 8000mAh battery, and support eSIM. 此前爆料信息显示，该机屏幕尺寸约为 8.8 英寸，支持 144Hz 高刷，内存规格为 12GB，电池容量达 8000mAh，并支持 eSIM。

item.title: MiniMax M2.7 开源，携手多家芯片厂商构建生态
item.guid: MiniMax-M2.7-开源，携手多家芯片厂商构建生态
item.description:
MiniMax M2.7 was officially open-sourced yesterday, and on its first day of open-sourcing, it completed model integration and inference adaptation with multiple domestic and international chip manufacturers and inference platforms, including NVIDIA, Ascend AI, Moore Threads, Muxi, and Kunlunxin. MiniMax M2.7 于昨日正式开源，并在开源首日完成了与英伟达、昇腾 AI、摩尔线程、沐曦、昆仑芯等多家国内外芯片厂商及推理平台的模型接入与推理适配工作。

It is reported that this model is MiniMax's first model where AI deeply participated in its own iteration, capable of independently building complex Agent Harnesses and completing highly complex productivity tasks based on capabilities such as Agent Teams, complex Skills, and Tool Search. 据悉，该模型是 MiniMax 首个由 AI 深度参与自身迭代的模型，能够自行构建复杂 Agent Harness，并基于 Agent Teams、复杂 Skills、Tool Search 等能力完成高度复杂的生产力任务。

Regarding software and platform ecosystems, domestic and international development platforms and communities such as Together AI, Fireworks, Ollama, vLLM, SGLang, Zhipu AI's FlagOS, and ModelScope have all completed the integration and adaptation of M2.7 on the first day. 软件与平台生态方面，Together AI、Fireworks、Ollama、vLLM、SGLang、智源众智 FlagOS 及魔搭等国内外开发平台与社区均已在首日完成 M2.7 的接入与适配。

💻 GitHub: github.com/MiniMax-AI/MiniMax-M2.7 💻 GitHub: github.com/MiniMax-AI/MiniMax-M2.7

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7

item.title: 地平线将发布中国首个舱驾融合智能体芯片方案
item.guid: 地平线将发布中国首个舱驾融合智能体芯片方案
item.description:
Horizon Robotics announced at the recent High-Level Forum on the Development of Intelligent Electric Vehicles (2026) that it will officially release China's first cabin-driving integrated AI intelligent chip solution, the Xingkong series, on April 22. 地平线 HorizonRobotics 在日前的智能电动汽车发展高层论坛（2026）上宣布，将于 4 月 22 日正式发布中国首个舱驾融合 AI 智能体芯片方案星空系列。

The core breakthrough of the Xingkong series lies in breaking the traditional architecture of separate cockpit and intelligent driving hardware, adopting a single-chip integrated design that consolidates complex computations, which previously required two domain controllers and two independent sets of hardware, into a single chip. 星空系列的核心突破在于打破座舱与智驾硬件分离的传统架构，采用单芯片一体化设计，将原本需要两个域控制器、两套独立硬件才能完成的复杂计算整合至一颗芯片。

Horizon stated that this solution, by sharing a set of memory and simplifying wiring harnesses and cooling systems, can achieve hardware cost optimization of 1500 to 4000 yuan per vehicle for automakers. 地平线方面表示，该方案通过共用一套内存、简化线束与散热系统，可为车企实现单车 1500 至 4000 元的硬件成本优化。

At the software architecture level, the Xingkong series upgrades vehicle-side AI from scattered distributed models to a central integrated large model, managing all scenarios such as driving, cockpit, and overall vehicle control with a single core computing power. 在软件架构层面，星空系列将车端 AI 从分散的分布式模型升级为中央集成大模型，以单颗核心算力统管驾驶、座舱、全车控制等全场景。

item.title: 强脑科技新全新灵巧手上线
item.guid: 强脑科技新全新灵巧手上线
item.description:
Yesterday, StrongMind Technology officially released its latest dexterous hand product, Revo 3. It integrates 21 degrees of freedom in a single hand, making it currently the world's first dexterous hand product to support 20+ degrees of freedom and an open-source ecosystem with full-palm haptic and visual-haptic feedback. 昨天，强脑科技正式发布旗下最新灵巧手产品 Revo 3，单手集成 21 个自由度，是目前全球首款支持 20+ 自由度、全掌触觉配视触觉开源生态的灵巧手产品。

    21 degrees of freedom in a single hand, which StrongMind determined to be the "sweet spot" after system testing. This approaches the 27 degrees of freedom of a human hand while avoiding excessive complexity that could lead to uncontrollable difficulty in control and decreased durability;

    Utilizes fully direct-drive integrated micro-joints, combined with self-developed high-density motors and reducers, pressing the drive control board into the palm to eliminate complex transmission chains, achieving a high-speed opening and closing response frequency of 3 Hz;

    Equipped with a full-palm haptic array and fingertip visual sensors, it can identify object contours, materials, and sliding states with sub-millimeter precision, achieving a full grip force of 70 N;

    Key components have a lifespan exceeding 2 million cycles, supporting 7x24 hours of continuous operation.

StrongMind plans to launch 3 to 5 SKUs of different specifications in the future, covering differentiated needs from industrial to consumer levels. 强脑计划未来推出 3 至 5 款不同规格的 SKU，覆盖工业级到消费级的差异化需求。

item.title: 海底捞回应员工自费 500 元买礼物事件
item.guid: 海底捞回应员工自费-500-元买礼物事件
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Haidilao recently issued an official statement regarding the "Haidilao partner forced to buy gifts at their own expense due to customer complaints" incident. 据界面新闻报道，海底捞日前就「海底捞伙伴因顾客投诉被强制自费买礼物事件」发布官方说明。

According to the statement, the company has completed an internal investigation and confirmed that the employee's reported situation is "largely true." Haidilao pledged to compensate the employee involved in accordance with the law and extend a sincere apology in person or through other channels. 根据说明，公司已完成内部核查，确认该员工反映的情况「基本属实」。海底捞承诺，将依法对涉事员工进行赔偿，并以当面或其他渠道致以诚挚歉意。

item.title: 广东烟草专卖局约谈美宜佳，查获「假烟」超 300 万支
item.guid: 广东烟草专卖局约谈美宜佳，查获「假烟」超-300-万支
item.description:
According to Nanfang+, the Guangdong Provincial Tobacco Monopoly Administration disclosed yesterday that in response to the "2026 Guangdong 315 Gala" exposing multiple Meiyijia stores selling counterfeit cigarettes, the provincial bureau has launched a comprehensive rectification campaign in conjunction with relevant functional departments. 据南方+报道，广东省烟草专卖局昨日披露，针对「2026 广东 315 晚会」曝光美宜佳多地门店销售假烟一事，省局已联合有关职能部门展开全面整治。

As of March 31, tobacco monopoly departments at all levels across the province inspected Meiyijia convenience stores 14,701 times, filed 566 cases, and seized 3.06 million counterfeit cigarettes. All 10 stores exposed by the gala have been investigated and prosecuted. 截至 3 月 31 日，全省各级烟草专卖部门共检查美宜佳连锁便利店 14701 户次，立案查处 566 宗，查获涉案卷烟 306 万支。晚会曝光的 10 家门店均已立案查处。

The Guangdong Provincial Tobacco Monopoly Administration conducted an administrative interview with Meiyijia headquarters, pointing out issues such as a lack of brand management and ineffective control over franchised stores. It demanded that the company immediately conduct self-inspection and correction, and submit a written rectification plan within a deadline. Additionally, the provincial bureau urged Meiyijia to formulate and implement a "tenfold compensation for fakes" pre-payment mechanism. 广东省烟草专卖局对美宜佳总部开展行政约谈，指出其品牌管理缺位、加盟门店管控不力等问题，要求企业立即自查自纠，限期提交书面整改方案。此外，省局还督促美宜佳制定落实「假一赔十」的先行赔付机制。

item.title: 《穿普拉达的女王 2》上海首映、正片片段曝光
item.guid: 《穿普拉达的女王-2》上海首映、正片片段曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, "The Devil Wears Prada 2" held its China premiere in Shanghai, with original cast members Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway making a joint appearance and sharing behind-the-scenes stories from the filming. 昨日，《穿普拉达的女王 2》在上海举行中国首映礼，原班人马梅丽尔·斯特里普与安妮·海瑟薇共同亮相，分享了拍摄幕后故事。

The new film continues the story from the previous installment, set against the backdrop of a declining traditional publishing industry. The once-glamorous fashion magazine "Runway" faces difficulties, and the fashion world's landscape is reshuffled. Andy has been promoted to editor-in-chief, Emily has become an executive at a luxury goods group, and Miranda must confront her relationship with them anew. 新片接续前作故事，背景设定在传统出版行业式微的当下，曾经风光无限的时尚杂志《Runway》面临困境，时尚圈格局重新洗牌。安迪晋升为杂志主编，艾米丽则成为奢侈品集团高管，而米兰达需要重新面对与她们之间的关系。

In the clip revealed yesterday, Andy frantically explains why she's at the "Runway" magazine office, while Miranda expressionlessly fires another employee on the spot, allowing Andy to rejoin. She then adds, "Happy? You just cost a Cornell honors student her job. I believe she's the first in her family to go to college. Anyway, come along." 在昨天曝光的正片片段中，安迪慌张解释自己为何出现在《Runway》杂志社，米兰达则面无表情地当场开除另一名员工，让安迪重新加入，随后补上一句：「高兴吗？你刚让康奈尔优等生丢了工作，我相信她是她家族里第一个上大学的人。总之，一起来吧。」

item.title: 《饥饿游戏：收获日出》发布海报
item.guid: 《饥饿游戏：收获日出》发布海报
item.description:
The producers of "The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping" have released the first batch of official posters, with a North American release scheduled for November 20. 《饥饿游戏：收获日出》片方发布了首批官方海报，11 月 20 日将在北美公映。

The film is a prequel to "The Hunger Games" series, focusing on the 50th Hunger Games – referred to in the original novel as the "Second Quarter Quell." Unlike regular seasons, the rules for this edition double the number of tributes to 48, with only one ultimately surviving. 影片为《饥饿游戏》系列前传，故事聚焦第 50 届饥饿游戏——即原著中「第二届世纪极限赛」。与常规赛季不同，本届规则将参赛贡品人数翻倍至 48 人，最终仅有一人能够存活。

The film's protagonist is 16-year-old Haymitch Abernathy from District 12, the younger version of the alcoholic mentor portrayed by Woody Harrelson in the original "Hunger Games" trilogy. 影片主角为来自 12 区、年仅 16 岁的黑密斯·阿伯纳西（Haymitch Abernathy），即《饥饿游戏》正传中由伍迪·哈里森饰演的那位酗酒导师的年轻版本。
